Helijet is proud to be part of your community for over thirty years.

Our Helijet family lives, works and plays in the communities we serve so we aim to support and give back to local arts and and charitable organizations that enrich all our lives. The following organizations are the core of our community commitment and we are privileged to partner in and support their endeavours;

Power To Be

Pacific Salmon Foundation

Hope and Health

Helicopters Without Borders

RBC GranFondo Whistler

BC Aviation Council

Rugby Canada / Canada Sevens

The Arts Club Theatre Company

The Belfry Theatre

Dance Victoria

Royal British Columbia Museum

Vancouver Island Symphony

The Port Theatre

Chemainus Theatre Festival

column_border_style=”solid”][vc_column_text]

Live Auction Requests:

Helijet is pleased to be able to participate in a limited number of additional fundraising events, featuring a Live Auction or Lottery, on a case by case basis. We ask that you please follow these guidelines when submitting your request:

  • Email your proposal on letterhead attached in Word or PDF formats. Please write “Community Support Request” in subject line.
    Please note that due to the overwhelming volume of requests only those receiving an affirmative response will be contacted in reply.
  • Detail the live auction/event purpose, estimated attendance, location, time, date plus full contact information
  • List the benefiting charity or organizations sponsoring the event
  • Explain what exposure, recognition and/or exclusivity Helijet will receive by supporting this event.

In addition to events duplicating our direct participation with the organizations above, the following will not be considered:

  • Events or proposals requiring cash contribution
  • Silent auction / door prize requests
  • Events occurring within 4 weeks of request
  • Organizations that are not registered charities or non-profit societies
  • Religious / political organizations
  • Organizations that discriminate against race, gender, sexuality, religion or lifestyle

Please allow 3-4 weeks for response to your submission. Phone calls are not accepted, incomplete and duplicate requests will not be considered.

Due to the overwhelming volume of requests only those receiving an affirmative response will be contacted in reply.
